title: for loop increment clauses should modify the loops' counters
description: "for" loop increment clauses should modify the loops' countersAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellconfusingWhy is this an issue?It can be extremely confusing when aforloop’s counter is incremented outside of its increment clause. In such cases, the increment should be moved to the loop’s increment clause if at all possible.Noncompliant code examplefor (i = 0; i < 10; j++) { // Noncompliant // ... i++; }Compliant solutionfor (i = 0; i < 10; i++, j++) { // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: For loop has empty increment clause but modifies counter in body - move increment to clause.
Loop counter variable modified in both increment clause and body - consolidate to increment clause.
